text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was gonna blow by everyone and take
the win!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. I didn't mean to look so lame in
front of you...
choice_data_list: You'll just have to try your best again next time.
You'll just have to try your best again next time.
You're not going to let it end like this, are you?
You're not going to let it end like this, are you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. I didn't mean to look so lame in
front of you...
choice_data_list: You'll just have to try your best again next time.
You'll just have to try your best again next time.
You're not going to let it end like this, are you?
You're not going to let it end like this, are you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm upset that I lost, but draggin' the loss along
with me isn't very cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: If I've got time to complain, I've got time to train!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh... You'll train with me once we get back,
right? I need to polish my technique... and my
coolness!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you're not mincing words today. Guess
that's why you're my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Of course it's not endin' like this! If anything, this
loss is just gettin' my engine heated up!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Of course I can! Your expectations, my
regrets—they're all just fuel in the tank!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait—next race, I'll show you just how
cool I can really be!
